case_title: TD BANK USA, N.A. VS. JULIAN O VALDES ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VALDES, JULIAN O $854.08 PRINCIPAL, $472.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,326.08, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 75035748)
